title: Cycle Trading Signal plugged into AI 🔥 lists 🔥
author: Patient-Knowledge915

comments.author: AttitudeGrouchy33
comments.body:
Curious how you're handling strategy adaptation here. The hard part with signal-based AI systems isn't generating the signals, it's knowing when the underlying edge has decayed and the model needs to stop trading or retrain.



When I was building Milo (AI agent for crypto trading), the biggest unlock wasn't better signals, it was forcing the agent to write a clear thesis before every trade and define exact invalidation conditions. That way when a strategy starts breaking, you can see the pattern in the logged reasoning and kill it before it bleeds too much.



Are you manually monitoring which cycles your AI is picking up on, or is there an automated layer that detects when its own logic stops working? Most backtests look clean until live market conditions shift and the bot keeps executing a strategy that no longer has edge.



If you're curious how we handle this in Milo (separate trading wallet, full transparency on every decision, risk caps you control), here's the small live wallet we've been testing: [https://app.andmilo.com/?code=@milo4reddit](https://app.andmilo.com/?code=@milo4reddit)

replies.author: Patient-Knowledge915
replies.body: It needs trading rules to trade on for better execution if not, it just will go crazy on you.

replies.author: AttitudeGrouchy33
replies.body: multi layer rules are implemented (Data, Algo, Agentic)

comments.author: Patient-Knowledge915
comments.body: My strategy is more a process than anything else. You can't build a trading bot without a trading process to execute on. My trading is based on Cycle Trading Signal counting cycles that align with the one playing out in present time, for example, if out of 10 Cycles evaluation 7 of the cycles when up that's a buy Signal I do this process now scanning the hold market with the process plugged into Ai I get 4 price projections on the month based on vwap rsi and w%r 14  that gives me a 5 10 15 21 days price projection all this information goes to a now Automated Google sheet if you connect your trading bot with all this information of this Google sheet you bot will have a base on what trades to make based on information with a high Accuracy %.
